en: I'm a man who's got very specific tastes

en: Oh, you got a false sense of humor in you
ko: 오, 너한테 엉뚝한 유머 감각이 있네

en: Yeah, yeah, yeah, just my type
ko: 그래, 그래, 그래, 딱 내 타입

en: Oh, I think it's time for me
